messages.text:
Hi there! 👋 Welcome! I'm **Rux**, your Roblox Studio AI assistant.

I'm connected to your live Studio session and can help you with things like:

- 🛠️ **Creating & editing scripts** (Server, Local, Module)
- 🔍 **Debugging errors** and reviewing your code
- 🏗️ **Building & modifying instances** in the Explorer (Parts, Tools, Folders, etc.)
- 📦 **Organizing your project** structure
- 💡 **Luau tips & best practices**

What would you like to work on today?
